title: dondia nigra
intro: Dondia nigra, also known as bitter astringent, is a type of plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family and is commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an astringent. The health benefits of Dondia nigra include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Dondia nigra can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
